title: P14.M1.E2 Scope Inheritance Resolver
summary: Implement the claimed deterministic scope inheritance resolver task in an isolated worktree, review the branch, then merge via workflow merge-lanes after lead verification.
goal: Complete P14.M1.E2.T001 for Clawq room-agent access scope inheritance.

jobs.name: p14-m1-e2-scope-resolver
jobs.prompt: You are implementing the claimed Clawq backlog task P14.M1.E2.T001 only: deterministic scope inheritance resolver. The lead has already run `bl claim P14.M1.E2.T001 --agent workflow-p14-m1-e2`; do not run `bl done`, `bl cycle`, or alter backlog status. Work in your workflow-created git worktree only. Follow PIRFL explicitly: plan, implement, review your diff, fix issues, then report. Use TDD: add focused failing tests first where practical, then implement the smallest compatible change. Read AGENTS.md plus relevant src/test CLAUDE.md files before editing. Do not run concurrent dune commands. Acceptance: resolver merges default -> workspace -> channel -> room layers deterministically; deny wins over allow; global security remains a ceiling; scoped-memory grants remain direct and non-transitive; every effective item includes provenance. Preserve compatibility for existing unprofiled sessions and legacy room-profile bundle behavior from P14.M1.E1. Keep this lane scoped to T001: do not implement effective-access snapshot persistence, reload refresh plumbing, explain-access CLI, or broad enforcement migration. If tests need small support helpers to make the resolver observable, keep them local and documented. Likely files: src/runtime_config_types.ml, src/runtime_config.ml, src/config_loader.ml, src/config_loader_support.ml, test/test_config_loader.ml, test/test_tools.ml, or a new focused test file. Verification expectation: run focused resolver/config tests and formatting check if OCaml files changed; run broader tests only if feasible without environment-only failures. Commit your implementation on branch workflow/p14-m1-e2-scope-resolver. Final output must include: task handled, files changed, tests run/results, commit hash, and follow-up risks. Do not merge to master; the lead will review, merge, verify, and then mark the backlog task done.

jobs.name: p14-m1-e2-review
jobs.prompt: Review the branch workflow/p14-m1-e2-scope-resolver against claimed task P14.M1.E2.T001. Use Codex gpt-5.5. Inspect `git diff master...workflow/p14-m1-e2-scope-resolver`, relevant tests, and the worker summary if available in workflow state. Focus on deterministic default -> workspace -> channel -> room merge behavior, deny-wins precedence, global security ceiling, direct/non-transitive scoped-memory grants, provenance on every effective item, compatibility with P14.M1.E1 legacy profile behavior, missing tests, and OCaml style. Also flag any scope creep into snapshot persistence, reload refresh, explain-access CLI, or enforcement migration. Return findings first, ordered by severity with file/line refs where possible. If clean, say so and list residual risks. Do not edit files.
